name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed contract renewals cause supplier penalties. We provide automated notifications instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and performance metrics, leading to potential compliance issues.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and performance metrics, leading to potential compliance issues.
